multiple_choice.instruction: Write the letter of the correct definition

options.A: a group of people who make the laws in some countries
options.B: a building or place that is used for a particular activity
options.C: a planned activity that has a particular purpose

items.definition: a group of people who make the laws in some countries

true_false.instruction: True or False? Write T or F.

items.statement: The following is a complete sentence: "Because she was tired after the long journey."
items.explanation: This is a sentence fragment (dependent clause). A complete sentence needs an independent clause.

items.statement: This is a run-on sentence: "I love reading books I could spend all day in a library."
items.explanation: Two independent clauses joined without punctuation or conjunction — a fused sentence (run-on).

short_answer.instruction: Read the question. Write your answer (max 3 words or a number).
short_answer.question: What is missing in this sentence? "I like reading I like writing too."
